input.organisation_context: Category: crm. No vendor filter selected.
success_factors: Select the strongest vendor for what ever.

criteria.label: Core CRM Features
criteria.description: Breadth and depth of lead management, pipeline tracking, and contact management capabilities.

criteria.label: Integration Ecosystem
criteria.description: Availability of native connectors for existing marketing and accounting software stacks.

criteria.label: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Annual recurring licensing fees per user seat.

criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Estimated professional services costs and internal resource hours required for deployment.

criteria.label: Data Security
criteria.description: Compliance with SOC2 Type II, encryption standards, and access control protocols.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial health and market longevity of the CRM provider.

criteria.label: Strategic Fit
criteria.description: Alignment with long-term organizational goals for sales automation and customer experience.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Ability to host and process customer data within specific geographic regions.
